name: POOL CORP
business: POOL CORP is the world's largest wholesale distributor of swimming pool supplies, equipment and related leisure products and a leading distributor of irrigation and landscape maintenance products. It sells to pool builders, pool service companies, retail stores, commercial pool operators, and landscape contractors. The company operates 456 sales centers in North America, Europe, and Australia.

exposures.sentence: We offer a growing selection of energy-efficient and environmentally friendly products, which support sustainability and help pool owners save energy, water, time and money.

The desire for consumers to enhance their outdoor living spaces with water-sensing and battery-powered alternatives, hardscapes, lighting and other outdoor living-related products provides us with additional future growth opportunities.
Our POOL360 digital ecosystem is a suite of products transforming the way pool professionals do business.

tamClaims.claim: The outdoor living industry services more than 14.0 million swimming pools and hot tubs in the United States alone, including approximately 5.5 million in-ground swimming pools.
tamClaims.sentence: We operate in the outdoor living industry, which services more than 14.0 million swimming pools and hot tubs in the United States alone, including approximately 5.5 million in-ground swimming pools.
